note: The DreamLayer plugin registry. Community-contributed plugins, validated by CI before they land. The website, phone app, and Mac panel all read this file. Social numbers (downloads/rating/comments) are served by the social API when configured; the schema carries them so the surfaces render either way.

plugins.name: face-synth
plugins.author: dreamlayer
plugins.description: Your head is a MIDI controller — yaw picks the note, pitch bends the filter, a tap plays it. Multiple wearers become a distributed band over the mesh.

plugins.name: open-food-facts
plugins.author: dreamlayer
plugins.description: Rank a shelf by Open Food Facts — Nutri-Score becomes a rating, allergens are flagged. A real TasteLens connector, no key, open data.
